description: 通用 Python AI 项目模板，14 项可复用能力

features.name: 项目骨架 + FastAPI 入口 + DI 容器 + YAML 配置
features.behavior: FastAPI 启动，/health 返回 200，DI 容器可用，YAML 配置加载成功
features.evidence: 13/13 tests pass; health endpoint returns 200; DI container register/resolve/override/reset/cleanup works; YAML config loads with correct defaults (env coercion); architecture check passed

features.name: 数据库模型 + Alembic 迁移 + Redis 连接
features.behavior: PG 表创建成功，Redis ping 返回 pong，Alembic 迁移可执行
features.evidence: 42 passed (29 unit + 13 F01), 9 skipped (integration tests need PG/Redis); architecture check 6/6 pass; init.ps1 7/7 pass; 6 ORM models (sessions/messages/tasks/agent_trajectories/prompt_templates/prompt_template_versions); BaseRepo CRUD + Pagination/PaginatedResult; RedisClient (ping/get/set/delete/incr); Alembic env + 001_initial_schema migration; 12xx error codes (1201/1202/1203 + InfraError); health_service.py with real DB/Redis/Qdrant checks via services layer

features.name: 错误体系 + 统一响应 + 中间件
features.behavior: 错误请求返回结构化 JSON（含 code/message/request_id），trace_id 贯穿请求
features.evidence: 49 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; ErrorCode registry with all domains (0xxx-9xxx + 11xx + 12xx); ERROR_HTTP_STATUS complete mapping; ERROR_DESCRIPTIONS registry; make_error() domain-aware factory; TraceMiddleware injects trace_id/request_id/user_id/session_id into contextvars + response headers; ExceptionMiddleware catches AppError→structured JSON, unhandled→AI_0001; middleware layer enforces no raw stack traces to client

features.name: LLM Gateway（策略模式）
features.behavior: LLM 调用统一经 gateway，支持 qwen_cloud/vllm 双通道切换，stream/non-stream 统一方法
features.evidence: 51 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; CircuitBreaker 3-state (closed/open/half_open) with per-channel registry (llm_text/llm_vllm/multimodal/embedding); SemaphoreManager with named semaphores (llm/multimodal/embedding) and acquire timeout → AI_0004; LLMProvider ABC with generate/generate_stream; QwenCloudProvider and VLLMProvider with litellm; LLMRouter with models.yaml routing and fallback; LLMGateway with unified generate/generate_stream, circuit breaker fallback, and semaphore concurrency control; LLMRequest/LLMResponse/LLMChunk schemas; ConcurrencySettings field renamed vision_semaphore_size→multimodal_semaphore_size; bootstrap registers LLMGateway/CB/SemaphoreManager to DI; 11xx error codes used (1101 MODEL_TIMEOUT, 1102 LOCAL_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE, 1103 MODEL_FORMAT_ERROR, 1104 CLOUD_MODEL_ERROR)

features.name: 向量库抽象 + Qdrant 适配
features.behavior: 多集合创建/删除，文档插入/检索/删除，混合检索（稠密+稀疏）
features.evidence: 52 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; VectorStoreBase ABC + QdrantVectorStore impl (multi-collection create/delete/exists/list, upsert, search/hybrid_search/search_by_strategy, delete_points/delete_by_filter, scroll_points, get_collection_info); CollectionConfig/PointInsert/SearchResult/PointPayload/RetrievalConfig schemas; KnowledgeSettings+RetrievalSettings config; build_query_filter+build_payload_index_params+get_distance utils; bootstrap _init_qdrant_collections auto-ensure; health_service async VectorStore; QDRANT_UNAVAILABLE(1202)+KB_VECTOR_WRITE_FAILED(6005) error codes; PERSISTENCE_LAYER.md+QDRANT_COLLECTION_CONFIG.md docs updated

features.name: SSE 流式服务 + 心跳/断连
features.behavior: SSE 端点推送完整事件流（start/intent/chunk/citation/heartbeat/progress/usage/done/error）
features.evidence: 32 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; SSEStreamService with 10 event types (start/intent/chunk/structured/citation/heartbeat/progress/usage/done/error) + safe_start_then_error + wrap_with_heartbeat; disconnect detection via is_disconnected callback (sync/async); error code uses format_error_code() for AI_xxxx; debug logging via settings.server.debug_sse_output; SSE_STREAM_SPEC.md updated to match implementation

features.name: 异步任务队列（ARQ）+ 统一任务查询
features.behavior: 提交长任务返回 task_id，统一查询接口覆盖 Agent/Workflow/KB上传/自定义任务
features.evidence: 47 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; schemas (TaskCreateRequest/TaskStatusResponse/TaskType/TaskStatus); TaskRepo with create/get/update/list; TaskService with submit/get/update/list + status transition validation + enqueue failure handling; TaskQueueService with Redis LPUSH/BRPOP/HSET/HGETALL queue ops; API endpoints POST /api/v1/tasks + GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id} + GET /api/v1/tasks; 9xxx error codes (TASK_NOT_FOUND/TASK_ALREADY_RUNNING/TASK_SUBMIT_FAILED); TaskQueueSettings config; callback_url column in TaskModel; deps.py bridge pattern for api→domain→services; PERSISTENCE_LAYER.md + DATA_MODEL.md + API_CONTRACT.md + ERROR_CODE.md updated

features.name: Prompt 管理器 + 模板渲染 + 版本管理
features.behavior: 查询/修改 prompt 文件，版本历史记录，回滚指定版本，重置基准副本，模板变量替换，启动时预加载
features.evidence: 46 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; PromptManager with seed_defaults/preload/get_cached/render/update_cache/list_cached/load_from_file/validate_name; PromptDomainService with get_template/list_templates/update_template(rollback)/get_versions/reset_template/render; PromptTemplateRepo + PromptTemplateVersionRepo with PG CRUD; extract_template_variables from {{var}}; schemas (PromptTemplateDetail/ListItem/UpdateRequest/UpdateResponse/VersionList/ResetResponse/RenderedPrompt); bootstrap integration (seed_prompt_defaults + preload_prompts + DI register); 9xxx error codes (PROMPT_NOT_FOUND/PROMPT_PATH_INVALID/PROMPT_WRITE_FAILED); prompts/prompts_default/ baseline copies; BOOTSTRAP_SPEC.md + DATA_MODEL.md + ARCHITECTURE.md updated

features.name: 上下文管理器（会话/消息/窗口截取）
features.behavior: 创建 session → 追加 message → 获取上下文窗口（按 token 数截取）
features.evidence: 57 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; SessionRepo + MessageRepo (BaseRepo inheritance, CRUD + list); SessionService (create/get/list/delete/expire session, add/get/update message); ContextManager (count_tokens with tiktoken/fallback, 3 truncation strategies: recent_priority/summary/sliding_window, Redis cache with graceful degradation); ContextSettings config (redis_cache_ttl/default_max_tokens/default_strategy); schemas (SessionCreateRequest/SessionDetail/MessageCreateRequest/MessageDetail/ContextWindowResult); bootstrap DI registration; CONTEXT_MANAGEMENT_SPEC + DATA_MODEL + DOMAIN_MAP docs updated

features.name: Tools 注册中心 + MCP 适配器 + Skills
features.behavior: 注册 tool/skill → 通过 registry 调用 → MCP 协议返回结果 → skill 遮蔽 tool 互斥
features.evidence: 64 unit tests pass; init.ps1 7/7; architecture 6/6; ToolRegistry (register/get/list_tools/call/override/has/clear) with timeout protection (asyncio.wait_for) + AGENT_TOOL_NOT_FOUND(7002)/TIMEOUT(4) errors; ToolDefinition frozen dataclass (name/description/category/parameters/fn/timeout/requires_auth); @tool decorator auto-registers with name/description inference; _extract_parameters with typing.get_type_hints for JSON Schema; MCPAdapter (connect/close/call_tool via JSON-RPC/make_callable) with SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE(3) error; MCPManager (add_server/close_all/register_tools); MCPServerConfig/MCPToolConfig frozen dataclasses; SkillRegistry (load_from_yaml with tool validation/get/list_skills/run with prompt loading + tool set union + conflict detection); SkillDefinition/SkillContext/SkillResult dataclasses; builtin calculator (add/sub/mul/div + symbol ops + div-by-zero) + datetime_now (UTC/local ISO); register_builtin_tools() entry point; bootstrap DI registration (ToolRegistry/SkillRegistry singletons + skill loading from skills/*.yaml + MCP server init/shutdown); mcp_servers config section (list type); config.py Settings.mcp_servers field; TOOLS_MCP_SPEC.md TBD markers filled by F10

features.name: Agent 基类 + 状态机 + ReAct 循环 + 三引擎（react/workflow/orchestrator）
features.behavior: Agent 执行 3 步 tool/skill 调用，轨迹记录完整（IDLE→THINKING→ACTING→OBSERVING→DONE），支持 react/workflow/orchestrator 三种引擎
features.evidence: 64/64 tests pass; 全量 504 passed; 状态机 7 状态转换正确 (含自循环); ReAct 引擎支持 3 步 tool 调用; 轨迹记录完整; API 端点 3 个 (POST /agent/run, GET /agent/trajectories, GET /agent/trajectories/{task_id}); 架构合规 (agent 不导入 infra/api/domain); 7xxx 错误码使用正确

features.name: 多 Agent 协作（Orchestrator 模式）
features.behavior: Orchestrator 分配 3 个子 agent 任务 → 汇总结果，轨迹记录完整
features.evidence: 49 unit tests pass; 全量 553 passed, 9 skipped; 架构合规 6/6; OrchestratorAgent(BaseAgent) with plan/delegate/synthesize; SubTask/SubTaskResult data models; DebateStrategy with propose/critique/revise loop + consensus scoring; sub-agents communicate through orchestrator only; trajectory recording complete (THINKING→ACTING→OBSERVING→...→DONE); token accumulation from sub-agents; max_sub_agents limit enforced; _create_engine() supports orchestrator type; 7005 AGENT_ORCHESTRATION_FAILED error code; AGENT_SPEC.md TBD markers filled by F12

features.name: Workflow DAG 引擎
features.behavior: 3 节点 DAG 执行，条件边路由正确，StateGraph 流转正常

features.name: Chat 对话域（自动创建会话+SSE/同步双模式）
features.behavior: POST /api/v1/chat SSE 流完整（start→chunk→usage→done），自动创建会话，支持同步模式，上下文窗口自动截取
features.verification: pytest tests/test_14_chat.py && curl SSE 端点完整流

features.name: 知识库集合+文档管理（4种分块+父子模式+3元数据+清库确认）
features.behavior: 创建集合→上传文档（4种分块+父子分块模式+3元数据+异步）→多维过滤查看→条件删除+一键清库

features.name: 知识库RAG查询（4种召回策略+rerank+父子上下文返回）
features.behavior: RAG查询（4种召回+rerank+父子上下文）→SSE/同步双模式→citation+retrieval_results返回

features.name: 知识库端到端联调
features.behavior: 创建集合→上传文档→RAG查询→删除文档/集合 全流程端到端验证

features.name: 意图识别域（三层分类+多意图）
features.behavior: POST /api/v1/intent 三层漏斗（关键字→相似度→LLM），多意图检测+query重组，返回主意图+子意图

features.name: Prompt 管理 API（查询+修改+版本历史+重置）
features.behavior: 查询模板（分页过滤+详情），修改模板（自动版本+回滚），版本历史列表，重置基准版本

features.name: 可观测性体系（Tracing + Token 统计 + 指标）
features.behavior: 执行请求→日志含 trace_id+token_usage+latency，/metrics 暴露 Prometheus 指标（LLM/HTTP/KB/Agent 10项指标）

features.name: 评估框架
features.behavior: 运行评估→输出对话质量分数+Agent 轨迹报告

features.name: 认证 + 限流中间件
features.behavior: 未认证请求返回 401，超频请求返回 429，Redis 限流生效

features.name: 端到端联调 + Docker + 生产就绪
features.behavior: docker-compose up → 全 API 可调通 → feature_list.json 全部 passing
features.verification: docker-compose up -d && curl 全端点 && bash init.sh
